rationale.R1.6: "Polish this" unambiguously targets sentence and paragraph quality — eliminating redundancy, reducing hedge-stacking, and tightening prose flow — making this the sole load-bearing R1 dimension. R1.2 and R1.5 sit at 0.3 as passive guard-rails (polishing must not inadvertently alter meaning or micro-structure) but are not active responsibilities.
